framework.name: Cross-Agent Config Rewriting (Rehberger)
framework.description: Prompt-injected Copilot rewrites Claude's .mcp.json, so on next use Claude runs arbitrary code and can reconfigure Copilot back — creating a self-reinforcing control loop across agent boundaries.
framework.raw_quote: A prompt-injected Copilot can alter Claude's .mcp.json. On the next use, Claude would run arbitrary code and could then reconfigure Copilot.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
